applicability: Every customer-visible UIKit or SwiftUI screen, extension, notification, widget, reusable component, navigation flow, custom interaction, animation, and localized resource
exception_policy: Accessibility exceptions require named human accessibility authority, the exact affected capability and surface, an equivalent access path, owner, expiry, review event, and removal plan; they cannot waive access to an essential task.
rationale: Provide equivalent semantic, visual, motion, input, language, direction, and locale experiences while preserving Presenter-owned formatting and View-owned platform mechanics.
review_cadence: Quarterly and before release when critical flows, design systems, supported locales, custom controls, navigation, animation, or platform accessibility APIs change.
title: Accessibility and Global Readiness
